judgment.summary: ServiceNow exhibits strong growth and profitability with a reasonable forward valuation, despite a high trailing P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter EPS was in line with estimates; next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: Forward P/E 19.81x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 59.27x.
Gross margin 76.6% and Operating margin 13.3% indicate strong operational efficiency.
Free cash flow $5.11B TTM is substantial.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a high mean target price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 59.27x is very high.
Earnings growth of 2.3% YoY is lagging revenue growth.
Current ratio 0.84 and Quick ratio 0.69 suggest potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Debt/Equity ratio of 20.73% is notable, though offset by strong cash flow.

news.paragraph: ServiceNow (NOW) is currently trading amidst a volatile software sector, as highlighted by Jim Cramer's commentary on emotional traders. While the company itself has no immediate catalyst mentioned in the headlines, the broader market sentiment for software stocks could influence short-term price action. Traders should consider the current market mood and the lack of specific company news when evaluating options positions.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “The Software Stocks Are Wildly Emotional Traders”
A parody ‘cockroach’ party in India becomes major outlet for youth anger and protest

examples.body: $NOW CNBC one of the commentators said buy NOW. Let' gooooo!
